message:
test(bd-2hk8): add 45 unit tests for response caching middleware

Cover CacheStats edge cases, CacheKey equality/hash/debug, LruCache
clear/remove/duplicate/LRU ordering, ToolCallCacheConfig filtering,
MethodCacheConfig defaults, ResponseCachingMiddleware construction and
fluent setters, disable method variants, include_tools, should_cache_method
edge cases, get_ttl for all method types, on_error passthrough, stats
tracking, and CacheEntry debug/clone/expiry. Server crate: 720 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
